title: Vietnamese Seafood Dumplings
description: A fusion of Vietnamese flavors with a seafood twist in a steamed dumpling. This dish is both refreshing and savory.

ingredients.name: Vietnamese seafood mix
ingredients.notes: usually includes shrimp, scallops, and fish

instructions: 1. Prepare the steamer basket and fill the bottom with water.
2. In a pan, heat sesame oil and sauté the garlic until fragrant.
3. Add the Vietnamese seafood mix and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add the dumpling filling and mix well.
5. Lay a wonton wrapper on a clean surface and place a tablespoon of the seafood mix in the center.
6. Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges to seal.
7. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
8. Place the steamer basket over the boiling water and steam the dumplings for 8-10 minutes.
9. Serve the dumplings with soy sauce and fish sauce (if using).
10. Garnish with shattering lettuce and enjoy!
